description: A project manager needs to get formal client sign-off for a major project milestone before proceeding to the next phase.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a milestone completion report demonstrating that all deliverables for the phase are complete.

expected_outcome.value: A clear, detailed report is created.

nodes.task_description: Send the report and a formal sign-off form to the client.

expected_outcome.value: The client receives the necessary documents.

nodes.task_description: Receive the signed form from the client and update the project plan to mark the milestone as complete.

expected_outcome.value: The milestone is officially completed, and the next phase can begin.
